advice: Drink chilled / cold to lessen the taste
Caffeine intake of up to 400mg/day is pretty safe, more serious side effects take place at doses of 1000mg+
~200mg is a good target to aim for in order to avoid developing a tolerance (too soon anyways)
Cycle off when you start taking ~300-400mg often
Avoid mixing with alcohol! Makes it easy to overdrink
